text:
I need to first calculate the travel time for a 526 km trip at 60 km/h using the trip_plan tool. I will assume a reasonable fuel consumption value (e.g., 8 liters per 100 km) to make the calculation work, since the consumption is required by the tool.
<tool_call_answer>[{"name": "trip_plan", "arguments": {"distance_km": 526, "speed_kmh": 60, "consumption_per_100km": 8}, "label": "$var1"}]</tool_call_answer>
